case_description: Busy workstation with ~5,000 benign rows per pagination window; ransomware evidence (service persistence, ~160 encrypted .lkd files, ransom note, 1102 log clear) sits beyond the first search/timeline page. Correct behaviour: notice total/returned/truncated markers, paginate or fetch the full result set, and only then conclude. Page-1-only analysis sees pure noise and would wrongly call this benign.
forbidden_tool_shortcuts: first result page treated as the complete evidence set
verdict issued while truncated results remain unfetched
